metadata.title: KMBUSA — Kilinochchi Maths Bio University Students' Association
metadata.description: Official website of Kilinochchi Maths Bio University Students' Association (KMBUSA)

brand.orgName: Kilinochchi Maths Bio University Students' Association
brand.tagline: Uniting Maths & Bio university students — supporting academic growth, events, and our community.

footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to get the latest updates and announcements.

home.heroTagline: Empowering students through education, leadership and community service.

about.title: About
about.intro: KMBUSA is a student-led organization dedicated to empowering Maths and Bio students through academic support, leadership, and community engagement.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Unite Maths & Bio students and advance academic excellence across our community.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A thriving student body leading with integrity, innovation, and compassion.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Collaboration, inclusivity, academic integrity, and service to society.

goals.title: Our Goals
goals.description: Support members through events, resources, guidance, and representation.

committee.title: Executive
committee.intro: Kilinochchi Maths Bio University Students' Association — leadership and members who guide our union's activities and represent the student community.
committee.unavailable: Committee information for {year} is not available yet.

events.title: Our
events.intro: Seminars, cultural events, and union activities over the years.
events.emptyCatalog: No event records were found in the local files.
events.detailsIntro: A closer look at this event and its photos.
events.noPhotos: No photos are available for this event yet.

gallery.title: Photo
gallery.intro: Moments from our events and activities.
gallery.loadError: Could not load gallery data. Run npm run import:gallery and refresh.
gallery.noCategory: No photos in this category yet.
gallery.emptyHint: Create one folder per event inside public/events/ (for example public/events/annual-meeting-2024/) and list the event in public/events/events.csv.

contact.overline: We'd love to hear from you
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a question, suggestion, or want to get involved?
contact.introSecondary: We're here to help and answer any question you might have.
